items.title: What happened in crypto today: Solana’s RWA boom, $527M BTC ETF outflows, and more
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's rise in real-world asset (RWA) integration could enhance its liquidity and utility, positioning it favorably in the evolving crypto landscape.

items.title: Crypto hacks fell 47% in H1 but ecosystem is no safer: CertiK
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite a 47% drop in hacks, the ongoing vulnerabilities in the ecosystem highlight the need for enhanced security measures, impacting user confidence across platforms.

items.title: Solana: How memecoins are driving the ‘SOL cycle’ narrative in H2
items.whyYouShouldCare: The growing interest in memecoins may influence Solana's market dynamics, potentially attracting new users and increasing transaction volume in the second half of the year.
